name: Windsurf
description: AI-powered code editor by Codeium with agentic AI capabilities, cascade mode, and deep codebase understanding

download.url_or_pattern: .url field in the Sparkle 2 JSON response from the update API

notes: Uses Sparkle 2 (JSON-based appcast format, not XML). Update API returns JSON with .version, .url, .pub_date fields. Formerly known as 'Windsurf Editor' by Codeium. Also available on Windows and Linux.
